data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an approval workflow for high-value bookings. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or checks confirming that such a workflow exists or is functioning as intended. The linked use case mentions the need for an approval workflow but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow for high-value bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add approval workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks to verify the existence and functionality of the approval workflow for high-value bookings.
